channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Geese @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-10-20 03:00 → 2026-10-21 03:00 — Geese at Fox Theater - Oakland. Geese is gaining traction with their unique sound and energetic live performances, making this tour highly anticipated.

item.title: Teddy Swims @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-11-11 03:00 — Teddy Swims at Chase Center. Teddy Swims is known for his powerful vocals and engaging stage presence, making this tour a must-see.

item.title: Phoebe Bridgers @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-28 02:30 → 2026-10-29 02:30 — Phoebe Bridgers at Chase Center. Phoebe Bridgers' tour is highly anticipated, with her storytelling and emotional performances resonating deeply with fans.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz's upcoming tour is a significant event, blending their eclectic sound with a strong visual performance.

item.title: Gracie Abrams @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-07 04:00 — Gracie Abrams at Oakland Arena. Gracie Abrams is rising in popularity with her relatable lyrics and captivating live shows, making this tour noteworthy.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-12 03:00 — Olivia Rodrigo at Oakland Arena. Olivia Rodrigo's tour is a major highlight, with her powerful performances and massive fan following.

item.title: KATSEYE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-11-20 04:00 — KATSEYE at Oakland Arena. John Summit's electronic music sets are gaining attention, promising an exciting night for dance music enthusiasts.

item.title: John Summit @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-12-05 03:00 — John Summit at Oakland Arena. John Summit's CTRL ESCAPE tour is expected to deliver high-energy performances, appealing to electronic music fans.

item.title: Nothing But Thieves @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2027-04-04 03:00 — Nothing But Thieves at Fox Theater - Oakland. Nothing But Thieves is known for their energetic performances, making their tour a compelling choice for rock fans.

item.title: Tom Jones @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-11-02 04:00 — Tom Jones at The Masonic. Tom Jones continues to draw crowds with his legendary status and engaging performances.

item.title: SWITCHFOOT @ Blue Note Napa Summer Sessions
item.description: 2026-10-24 02:00 — SWITCHFOOT at Blue Note Napa Summer Sessions. Grace Enger's tour is gaining attention for her fresh sound and relatable lyrics.

item.title: Fetty Wap @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-12-04 04:00 — Fetty Wap at The Masonic. Fetty Wap's Nostalgia Tour is set to bring back hits that defined a generation, appealing to fans of hip-hop.

item.title: Arcángel @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-11-22 04:00 — Arcángel at San Jose Civic. Arcángel's La 8va Maravilla World Tour is expected to showcase his unique style and strong fanbase.

item.title: Angine de Poitrine @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-12-08 04:00 — Angine de Poitrine at The Castro Theatre. Angine de Poitrine is expected to deliver a unique performance, appealing to fans of avant-garde music.

item.title: Thee Sinseers @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-11-07 04:00 — Thee Sinseers at The Fillmore. Thee Sinseers are known for their engaging live shows, blending soul and R&B in a compelling way.
